<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\Mailer\Transport\Smtp\Auth; use Symfony\Component\Mailer\Exception\TransportExceptionInterface; use Symfony\Component\Mailer\Transport\Smtp\EsmtpTransport; /** * An Authentication mechanism. * * @author Chris Corbyn */ interface AuthenticatorInterface { /** * Tries to authenticate the user. * * @throws TransportExceptionInterface */ public function authenticate(EsmtpTransport $client): void; /** * Gets the name of the AUTH mechanism this Authenticator handles. */ public function getAuthKeyword(): string; }
